channel.title: Jmap on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Jmap on Arrans github.io

item.title: stalwartlabs/stalwart
item.description: All-in-one Mail & Collaboration server. Secure, scalable and fluent in every protocol (IMAP, JMAP, SMTP, CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV).

item.title: bulwarkmail/webmail
item.description: Webmail built for the 21st Century. A modern, self-hosted email client for Stalwart Mail Server powered by the JMAP protocol. Email, calendar, contacts and files. Fast, private, and open source.

item.title: linagora/tmail-flutter
item.description: A multi-platform (Flutter) application for reading your emails, with your favorite devices, using the JMAP protocol!

item.title: rockorager/go-jmap
item.description: JMAP client library for go (mirror of git.sr.ht/~rockorager/go-jmap)
